daily_image.alt: A loving family photo for Meme

prayer.title: Glory Be
prayer.text: Glory be to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit, as it was in the beginning, is now, and ever shall be, world without end. Amen.

thought.headline: You are held today.
thought.body: A hospital room can feel small, but God’s mercy is not small. Let this morning be enough for this morning: one breath, one prayer, one quiet sign of love at a time.
thought.verse: The Lord is near to the brokenhearted. — Psalm 34:19

blessing: May the Lord bless you and keep you in His peace today.
practice: Ask St. Joseph, patron of families, to guard everyone who loves you.

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
